name: Resplendent
short_description: This game is a delightful blend of pixel art and fast-paced gameplay.
detailed_description:
This game is a perfect fusion of pixel art and fast-paced gameplay.
The protagonist is a pixelated little character who travels along an endless green track.
Obstacles are scattered on the track, requiring quick lane changes to avoid collisions. As the game progresses, the speed increases and each dodge becomes more challenging. The pixel art style creates a nostalgic feeling, while cheerful music adds excitement to the competition.
Gameplay
Players can move between multiple lanes by pressing the "A" and "D" keys.
